title: lagophylla dichotoma
intro: Lagophylla dichotoma, also known as woolly paper daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing relief from sore throats and coughs. In herbal preparations, Lagophylla dichotoma is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
